description: The Magimix Cook Expert is an all-in-one multifunctional appliance designed for professional home kitchens. This standard variant features a 3.5-litre stainless steel Thermo bowl, distinct for its induction heating that reaches 160°C. Unlike the standalone food processor, this model includes the full food processor attachment with three BPA-free bowls (3.6L, 2.6L, and 1.2L) and four Sabatier grating and slicing discs. It effectively replaces a stand mixer, blender, and steamer, coming complete with a dedicated digital scale, a recipe book, and a two-tier internal steamer basket.
features: Induction heating system (1700W); 30°C to 160°C precise temperature control (1°C increments); 900W commercial-grade induction motor; 12 automatic programmes; Expert manual mode
uses: Cooking, steaming, blending, kneading, whisking, grating, slicing, chopping, emulsifying, slow cooking, sous-vide.

accessories.name: Thermo Bowl
accessories.description: 3.5L double-walled stainless steel bowl for hot and cold preparations.

accessories.name: Universal Blade
accessories.description: Heavy-duty stainless steel blade for chopping, blending, and kneading.

accessories.name: Whisk
accessories.description: Accessory for aerating egg whites, whipping cream, and mashing potatoes.

accessories.name: Steamer Basket
accessories.description: Internal stainless steel steaming tray for vegetables, fish, and meat.

accessories.name: Glass Lid
accessories.description: Shatterproof glass lid with seal for monitoring cooking progress.

accessories.name: Food Processor Bowls
accessories.description: Set of 3 transparent bowls (Main, Midi, Mini) for cold processing tasks.

accessories.name: Slicing and Grating Discs
accessories.description: Stainless steel Sabatier discs (2mm and 4mm) for precision cutting.

accessories.name: XL Steamer
accessories.description: 5.5L external steaming unit for increased capacity.

accessories.name: Dough Hook
accessories.description: Specialised tool for kneading heavy doughs.

accessories.name: Spiral Expert
accessories.description: Kit for creating vegetable noodles and ribbons.

accessories.name: Extra Press XL
accessories.description: Juice extractor attachment for cold press juicing.

accessories.name: Cocotte
accessories.description: The Cocotte is an optional slow-cooking accessory for the Magimix Cook Expert, featuring a high-quality cast-iron pot with a ceramic coating designed for simmering, stewing, and baking with even heat distribution.

name: Magimix Cook Expert
